digest.greeting: Friday, June 19, Jean. Today is anchored by TRACE/Staff Aug, the Phase 2 IT sync, CoE Sync, the EPMO EOW check-in, Executive Project Status Slide Update, and the Litify Sprint #12 review. Outlook shows 7 meetings plus 1 protected block, with 3 carried-over priorities, 1 active reminder, and 4 urgent items. The day should stay focused on locking Staff Augmentation ownership and dates, bringing Send Letters back to a realistic timeline, making the EPMO storyline leadership-ready, and handling the Mar access/leave coverage risk before the afternoon reporting block. Teams broad-thread discovery again returned a Microsoft Graph 403, so Teams context is limited to readable unread chats and targeted searches.

items.label: Lock Staff Augmentation ownership, scope, and dates
items.detail: Nadia's action plan sharpened the open work: Duvan owns the latest PRD, process flows, handoff documentation, and outstanding follow-ups; Yuri and Nadia need MVP scope and roadmap by June 23; Josh and Deepak need BA and architect assignment by June 29; Rippling ownership is still a risk. Use today's TRACE/Staff Aug and EPMO blocks to make the next owners and dates explicit.

items.label: Bring back the Send Letters Queue timeline
items.detail: Jhara committed to return after Procurement with Baesman status, the workstreams that can continue in parallel, and a target go-live path so IT can size the effort. This remains the cleanest way to unblock Anu's concern about BA capacity and stalled requirements.

items.label: Make the EPMO presentation storyline leadership-ready
items.detail: Use the 12:00 PM block, 1:30 PM EPMO check-in, and 3:00 PM Executive Project Status Slide Update to decide the proof points and risk framing. Staff Augmentation, Send Letters, CoE metrics, and active CM-CoE intake movement are the likely story anchors.

items.label: Work SMART goals from the KPI set
items.detail: Dashboard reminder: "Trabajar SMART goals de KPIs." Janet also confirmed in EPMO Leadership that KPIs and SMART goals go together, with KPIs already reviewed at a high level. Convert the KPI set into SMART goals for PM/PE follow-through while the EPMO storyline is fresh.

sections.title: Today's Schedule
sections.note: Times shown in Jean's Outlook working timezone. The day has a protected 12:00 PM block, then a compressed afternoon with a 1:30 PM overlap between EPMO EOW Check In and Get to Know the Project Management Team.

items.label: TRACE & Staff Aug touchpoint
items.detail: First checkpoint for TRACE readiness and Staff Augmentation ownership follow-through after Nadia's action plan.

items.label: Phase 2 Weekly IT Projects Sync
items.detail: Bring Phase 2 SMS status, Calendar-Based SMS Automation intake context, and any UAT or Litify dependencies that need IT visibility.

items.label: CoE Sync Jean
items.detail: Prep-worthy because Mar has both a same-day leave request and a document-access ticket. Use this to align on CoE ownership, active intakes, and what can still move today.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Best protected block for EPMO slides, SMART goals from KPIs, and Staff Augmentation action-plan cleanup before the afternoon reporting run.

items.label: EPMO EOW Check In and PM Team session overlap
items.detail: Outlook shows EPMO EOW Check In and Get to Know the Project Management Team at the same time. The EPMO check-in was moved earlier and includes Nadia for programmatic updates, so decide which coverage matters most.

items.label: Executive Project Status Slide Update
items.detail: Natural deadline for the EPMO storyline, Staff Augmentation action-plan framing, Send Letters timeline status, and active CM-CoE intake updates.

items.label: IT Litify Sprint #12 Review
items.detail: Sprint review with IT Software, project managers, and stakeholders. Useful if SMS automation, UAT readiness, or Litify deployment dependencies need visibility.

items.label: Approve or route Mar Garcia's leave request
items.detail: Rippling sent a same-day leave request for Mar for June 19. Decide whether to approve it and adjust CoE Sync coverage accordingly, especially because Mar also reported a document-access issue last night.

items.label: Escalate Mar's document-access ticket if it blocks CoE work
items.detail: Mar reported ticket 0030415 and said she cannot open documents of any type. If the issue affects CoE Sync, the Executive Project deck, or PMO/CM-CoE intake work, get the ticket in front of IT early.

items.label: Triage Calendar-Based SMS Automation now that it is an active project
items.detail: Asana and intake emails show Calendar-Based SMS Automation for Litify was converted/shared as a project and routed through CM-CoE/PMO intake. Decide whether it belongs in today's Phase 2 IT sync, Sprint #12 review, or the EPMO project-status update.

items.label: Review Jessica's Case Change scoping follow-up
items.detail: Jessica sent a Scoping Follow-up: Case Change Process meeting item yesterday afternoon. Review whether this needs a next owner, a clarified scope, or a spot in the EPMO/CoE follow-up queue.

items.label: Nadia's Staff Augmentation action plan needs owner/date confirmation
items.detail: The unread action-plan email sets immediate and short-term dates for PRD/process flow sharing, deep dives, BA/architect assignment, MVP scope, roadmap, Rippling discovery, and Salt Click SOW revision. Reply or use today's meetings to confirm which dates are committed versus aspirational.

items.label: Mar Garcia leave request is waiting in Rippling
items.detail: The request is specifically for June 19. If approved, Mar should fully disconnect, so coverage for today's CoE and document-heavy work needs to be explicit.

items.label: Mar reported ticket 0030415 for blocked document access
items.detail: Unread 1:1 Teams messages from Mar say: "Nuevo ticket" and "no puedo abrir docs de ningun tipo." Treat this as a practical blocker if she is expected to support CoE, EPMO deck, or intake documentation today.

items.label: Decide whether the Toggl nudge becomes a recurring reminder
items.detail: In Tudo Bem! - PM Phase 2 Team, Jhara responded to Jean's Toggl nudge with a request to make it a reminder. Decide whether this should become a formal team reminder or stay as an informal chat nudge.

items.label: Mar Garcia requested leave for today
items.detail: Rippling shows a leave request for Mar Garcia for June 19. If approved, avoid relying on her for live CoE/document work today and identify backup coverage.

items.label: Approve Timecards & Prepare for the Week
items.detail: Start Monday with the normal admin block before the TRACE and Staff Aug thread resumes.

items.label: TRACE & Staff Aug touchpoint
items.detail: Follow-up point for Staff Augmentation owners, MVP scope due June 23, and any TRACE readiness decisions from today.

items.label: 1:1 Shelley & Jean
items.detail: Use this needs/support conversation to clarify any department support items that should not get lost behind Staff Aug and EPMO follow-ups.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Useful for Staff Aug action-plan cleanup or SMART-goals drafting before the leadership-heavy afternoon.

items.label: EPMO Portfolio Review
items.detail: Review new project requests and assign next steps; Calendar-Based SMS Automation and CLR Visibility may need routing clarity if not closed today.

items.label: Jean/Sara 1:1 + Midyear
items.detail: Sara extended this to an hour for midpoint discussion. Bring the final Friday EPMO storyline, Staff Aug risk framing, and SMART-goals/KPI notes.

items.label: Send Letters Queue Touchpoint
items.detail: Monday has another Send Letters touchpoint; use it as the next checkpoint if today's timeline does not land.

reminderHistory.text: Seguimiento a stakeholders de Co-counsel network project. Go/no-go?
Hacer follow up con HR para resultados de la survey
Responder al correo de Eugenia para Danny sobre problemas con Venn
Seguimiento a David para la creación del COE playbook
solicitar a TMs los numeros de sus tickets de IT relacionados a Venn
Preparar presentación para Reunión del Viernes sobre presentar EPMO
Seguimiento a Yuri - TRACE tasksets listos para UAT
